name: Ashley Morgan
voiceLine: Ashley has worn through eleven pairs of Pegasus. She believes the best shoe is the one you'll actually run in tomorrow.
runningStory:
Ashley started running after a particularly bad breakup and a copy of 'What I Talk About When I Talk About Running'. Four years, three marathons and eleven pairs of Nike Pegasus later, she still runs best when she's not thinking about running.

She's had her share of setbacks — a stress fracture in year two, a DNS at Manchester, and one very regrettable dalliance with minimalist shoes — but she's learned more from those than from the good runs.

These days she runs 55km a week, rarely misses a parkrun, and is quietly obsessed with getting her Berlin qualifier below 3:30. She writes about shoes the way she'd explain them to a friend at the finish line: honestly, and without the jargon.
